# Daily Report — 2026-07-20

## Task Completed
Add `list_cmdb_audit_log` tool — queries the `sys_audit` table for field-level change
history on CMDB configuration items. Filters: `ci_table` (default `cmdb_ci`),
`ci_sys_id` (matches `documentkey`), `field_name`, `changed_by` (username),
`changed_after`/`changed_before` (datetime range with validation). Results ordered
newest-first with pagination (`has_more`/`next_offset`). Registered in
`system_administrator` and `full` packages.

## Test Results
- New tests: 23
- All passing: yes
- Coverage: 93% total (cmdb_tools.py coverage maintained)

## Security
Clean — pip-audit found no vulnerabilities in auditable packages.

- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — imported params + function, registered in tool map
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — added to `system_administrator` and `full` packages
